title: Meditation Group Dashboard
welcome: A private space for your weekly practice, shared notes, and member resources.

nextSession.label: Next sit
nextSession.location: Update this with your living room or Zoom link
nextSession.notes: You can edit this file to add chants, readings, parking details, or the week's theme.

announcements.title: Welcome to the private dashboard
announcements.body: This starter message is here so the page feels complete on first deploy. Replace it with your next group update.

announcements.title: Member login is invite-based
announcements.body: Invite your two members from Netlify Identity, then optionally set MEDITATION_ALLOWED_EMAILS for a stricter email allowlist.

resources.title: Weekly Zoom link
resources.description: Replace this with the recurring meeting URL or a notes page.

resources.title: Suggested reading
resources.description: Swap in a PDF, Google Doc, or article for the current cycle.

practiceLibrary.name: Opening practice
practiceLibrary.detail: 5 minutes of settling and breath awareness.

practiceLibrary.name: Closing reflection
practiceLibrary.detail: Short sharing round or one take-away sentence.

quote.text: Returning to the breath, we return to one another.
